page.title: YuanqiZhiKe Toolkit - Free Offline Tools for Global Creators
page.description: One-stop platform providing free offline frontend tools covering multiple vertical industries for global creators and practitioners.

hero.title: Free Offline Tools for Every Vertical Industry
hero.description: YuanqiZhiKe Toolkit is a one-stop platform delivering free, privacy-first frontend tools to creators and professionals worldwide. Download, open locally, work offline -- no registration, no data collection, no compromises.

item1.title: Multi-Industry Coverage
item1.desc: From content writing to web development, our tools span every major vertical industry. Find exactly what you need, when you need it.

item2.title: 100% Offline & Private
item2.desc: Every tool runs entirely in your browser. Your data never leaves your device. No servers, no tracking, no privacy concerns.

item3.title: Open Source & Free
item3.desc: All tools come with full source code. Study, modify, and learn from production-ready code -- completely free of charge.

item4.title: Zero Barriers
item4.desc: No sign-up, no login, no paywalls. Just download the ZIP, unzip, and open in your browser. That simple.

step1.title: Browse Tools
step1.desc: Visit our tools catalog and filter by category to find the right tool for your workflow.

step2.title: Accept License
step2.desc: Click download, review and accept the source code license agreement.

step3.title: Download & Use
step3.desc: Get the ZIP file, extract it, and open index.html in any browser. Start working offline immediately.

cta.title: Need a Custom Tool or SaaS Product?
cta.desc: We offer professional frontend tool and web application development services for businesses worldwide. From concept to deployment, our team delivers production-ready solutions.
